welcome:
👋 Welcome to ArchiveBot!

I'm your personal content archiving assistant. I can help you:

📦 Archive various content (text, images, videos, documents)
🏷️ Automatically tag and categorize
🔍 Quickly search archived content
💾 Multi-level storage strategy

Send me any content or use commands:

/help - View help
/search - Search archives
/tags - View all tags
/stats - View statistics
/review - Archive review
/language - Change language

Let's get started! 🚀
help: 📖 Help Archive Content: • Send any content directly to me • Add tags using #tag format • Forward messages to record source • Batch forwarding auto-aggregation Basic Commands: /start - Initialize bot /help - View this help /search (/s) <keyword> - Search archives /tags (/t) - View all tags /stats (/st) - View statistics /review - Archive review & stats Notes: /note - Add note to archive /notes - View all notes Data Management: /trash - View trash bin /export - Export data (JSON/HTML/Markdown) /backup - Backup & restore database Other: /ai - AI status /language (/lang) - Change language Search Tips: • Keyword: /s python • Tag: /s #tech • Combined: /s #tech python • Click results to jump to channel AI Features: • Smart summary generation • Auto extract key points • Tag suggestions (batch shared) • Intelligent categorization
unauthorized:
⛔ Unauthorized

Sorry, this bot is for private use only.
search_no_keyword:
Please provide search keyword.

Example: /search python
tags_empty:
No tags yet.

Start archiving content to create tags!
language_select:
🌍 Select Language:

 Please choose your preferred language:
rate_limit_exceeded:
⚠️ Rate limit exceeded

Please wait {wait_time} seconds before trying again.
note_add_failed:
❌ Failed to add note

Please check if the archive ID is correct.
note_no_archive_id:
Please provide an archive ID.

Example: /note 123
invalid_archive_id:
❌ Invalid archive ID

Please provide a valid numeric ID.
note_manager_not_initialized:
❌ Note feature not initialized

Please restart the bot.
no_notes_found:
📝 Archive #{archive_id} has no notes.

💡 Reply to archive message to add notes!
notes_search_no_keyword:
Please provide search keywords.

Example: /notes todo
trash_manager_not_initialized:
❌ Trash feature not initialized

Please restart the bot.
trash_empty:
🗑️ Trash is empty

No deleted archives.
trash_restore_failed:
❌ Failed to restore archive #{archive_id}

Archive may not be in trash.
trash_delete_failed:
❌ Failed to delete archive #{archive_id}

Archive may not be in trash.
invalid_days:
❌ Invalid days

Please provide a valid number.
trash_empty_success_days:
✅ Emptied archives older than {days} days

{count} archives permanently deleted.
trash_invalid_command:
❌ Invalid command

Usage:
/trash - View trash
/trash restore <id> - Restore archive
/trash delete <id> - Delete permanently
/trash empty [days] - Empty trash
archive_delete_failed:
❌ Failed to delete archive #{archive_id}

Archive may already be deleted.
export_manager_not_initialized:
❌ Export feature not initialized

Please restart the bot.
export_tag_usage:
Usage: /export tag <tag_name> [format]

Example: /export tag tech markdown
export_invalid_format:
❌ Invalid format

Supported formats: markdown, json, csv
export_failed:
❌ Export failed

Please try again later.
backup_manager_not_initialized:
❌ Backup feature not initialized

Please restart the bot.
backup_restored:
✅ Restored from backup: {filename}

Please restart the bot to apply.
backup_invalid_keep:
❌ Invalid keep count

Please provide a number.
backup_cleanup_done:
✅ Cleanup done

Deleted {deleted} backups, kept {keep} latest.
review_usage: 📊 Review & Statistics Select a time period to view your activity: Features: • Archive trend analysis • Active days count • Top tags statistics • Random archive discovery
review_no_data:
📊 No activity during this period.

Start archiving to see statistics!
review_invalid_period:
❌ Invalid period

Use: week, month, or year
review_manager_not_initialized:
❌ Review feature not initialized

Please restart the bot.
tags_button_list_header:
🏷️ Tag List ({count})

Click tags to view related content:
ai_status_unavailable:
⚠️ Service: Unavailable
Please check API key configuration
ai_status_enable_guide:
💡 *How to Enable*
1. Edit config/config.yaml
2. Set ai.enabled: true
3. Configure ai.api.provider and ai.api.api_key
4. Restart the bot

Supported providers: OpenAI, Claude, Qwen
note_mode_enter: 📝 Note Mode Activated Please send your note content: • 💬 Text message • 🖼️ Image • 🎤 Voice 💡 You can also reply to an archive message to link the note Send /cancel to exit note mode
note_mode_archive_linked: 📝 Note Mode Activated 📎 Linked to Archive #{archive_id} Please send your note content: • 💬 Text message • 🖼️ Image • 🎤 Voice Send /cancel to exit note mode
note_mode_save_failed:
❌ Failed to save note

Please try again later.
notes_list_empty:
📝 No notes yet

Use /note command or click the 📝 button in archive lists to create notes.
